title: Kaido Descends on Wano
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Luffy, Unknown person #1, Kaido, Unknown person #2, Law, Unknown person #3 as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kaido appears in dragon form and turns the Wano rebellion into an immediate confrontation.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Kaido is a Dragon!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What the hell is that!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So that's...!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that's right. That thing you see in front of you is kaidou...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's able to...!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Transform into a Dragon!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: UUNN NGH...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: LORD MOMONO- SURE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Huh!? Lord momo- Nosuke!?

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: That's... a dragon!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...I shall explain...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Why He became like this later!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: of all the things, he's able to turn into one of those detestable dragons!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...Over there is... Okobore Town!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why did he come to Kuri so suddenly....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...!! My apologies, Kin'Emon.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The truth is... straw hat-ya, zero-ya, and myself were exposed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: What the hell did you do, Law!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You straw hats have no right to say that to me....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah... it was definitely luffy's fault, then. A

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Well, in any case, we're sorry.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but on the other hand, that was ALL that happened....!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Kaido is making weapons in this country...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and had an underground partnership with Doflamingo and Caesar,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In order to produce artificial devil fruits known as smiles...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...We were the ones who destroyed the production factories on punk hazard and dressrossa,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and were responsible for sending Doflamingo, the buyer, to rot in jail...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were the ones who picked this fight... so of course he's after...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Mine and straw hats' heads.

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: Luffy!! Where are you going!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Luffy- Dono!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't go after him. I'll go!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we're exposed any further, they will know that all of the straw hat crew and the heart pirates are here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There'll be a huge manhunt to take us out!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: think carefully.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We were the only ones discovered.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So the plan is still fine!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Under- stood?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...well, what will you and the other two do, then?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want to just turn a blind eye to this, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw hat- ya has already bonded with the people of this country.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he is blinded by his emotions and acts rock- lessly, our plan will be over.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we aren't able to gather enough people by the day of the final battle, there'll be no point to this alliance.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...so let me go and figure this out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You guys must not be seen!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Pop...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: For!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell did he do in the few hours that we were apart....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Dammit, Luffy!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 51 dialogue beats. Kaido’s arrival turns the rebellion from a secret plan into a brutal confrontation.
